The fact that she's developed a fever and has pus in the middle meatus points towards sinusitis.
The middle meatus is part of the paranasal sinuses, so this is likely maxillary sinusitis.

The daytime cough might be from postnasal drip, which is common in sinusitis.
I should also consider other possibilities, but given the timeframe and symptoms, sinusitis seems most likely.
